description: Implement a computerized Wisconsin Card Sorting Test (WCST) using PsychoPy Coder (not Builder) for neuropsychological assessment. The task involves creating a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/wcst_cards.csv containing a 64-card deck with columns for cardID, color (red, green, yellow, blue), shape (triangle, star, cross, circle), and number (1, 2, 3, 4). The experiment script at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/wcst_task.py must display four static reference cards (1 red triangle, 2 green stars, 3 yellow crosses, 4 blue circles) and a central response card, allowing matching via mouse clicks. The sorting rule must switch from Color to Shape to Number after every 6 consecutive correct trials. The script should provide 'CORRECT' or 'INCORRECT' visual feedback and save trial data to a CSV file.
